# Code of Conduct

Sentori adopts the [Contributor Covenant
v2.1](https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct/).

The summary:

1. Be respectful. Disagree on ideas, not on people.
2. Don't harass, dox, or threaten anyone — period.
3. Assume good faith from other contributors before
   escalating.

Enforcement: report incidents privately to
**conduct@golia.jp**. Reports are confidential; we'll
acknowledge within 5 business days and act per the
Covenant's enforcement ladder.

Maintainer team has final say on what constitutes a
violation. Persistent violations result in temporary or
permanent ban from the project's public spaces.
